message:
feat(service): add meta_ingest module for metadata batch ingestion

Add convenience helpers to batch-insert FileMeta records into the meta-index,
wrapping open/create, write, and commit operations.

New meta_ingest.rs module:
- ingest_file_meta_batch() - accepts index path, FileMeta iterator, optional WriterConfig
- ingest_with_paths() - uses PathsSection from config for index path
- Handles index open/create, writer initialization, batch insertion, commit

Exported from service lib.rs for use by volume scan coordinator and
NTFS watcher integration.

Related: c00.3.2 (MFT enumeration), 2f8ff23 (FileMeta conversion)
